title: These off-brand Pikachu rides are terrifying
author: Popkin
summary: Unlicensed Pikachu coin-operated rides have been showing up outside shops and malls across Asia and occasionally the U.S. for years — bootleg attractions with exaggerated facial features, wrong proportions, and expressions that differ wildly from the official character. Nurtle on Instagram collected some of the best examples, and they look like what Pikachu might look like on a bad trip. —
